_source_of_truth_note: Canonical precursor-origin spec for Wasteland Crystals. Per the boss's 2026-05-07 note: 'i think the units of precursor chemicals will have to have origins attached to them to get an accurate paragenesis.' Each precursor token (used in minerals.json decay_precursor arrays) is mapped here to its source substrate, the chemical species it delivers, and the decay mechanism by which the substrate releases it. Narrators (js/04-narrators.ts) compose paragenesis from a scenario's substrate_inventory ∩ mineral.decay_precursor → precursor.source_substrate, naming only origins the cited papers (or 'implied typical MSW' fallback) actually support.

_schema.id: Slug matching the dictionary key. Same token used in minerals.json decay_precursor arrays.
_schema.species: Chemical species delivered (e.g., 'SO4²⁻', 'HCl', 'Pb²⁺', 'biogenic H2S'). Plain-text — used in narrator prose.
_schema.source_substrate: Substrate token from scenarios.json substrate_inventory and minerals.json substrate_grows_on. Narrators check this against the active scenario's inventory before naming this precursor as a confirmed source.
_schema.decay_mechanism: 1-2 sentences describing how the source substrate releases this precursor. Used in narrator prose as the explanatory clause.
_schema.phase_window: Leachate phases during which this precursor is most actively delivered. Used by narrators to position the precursor in the scenario's phase timeline.
_schema.narrator_phrase_short: Compact phrase for inline narrator use ('drywall-derived sulfate', 'battery-electrolyte sulfuric acid'). Lets the narrator name the precursor's origin in prose without the full mechanism.

_audit_summary._notes: v0.1.0 precursor spine. Covers the precursor tokens currently referenced in minerals.json decay_precursor arrays plus the narrator-needed acid + chloride + phosphate + carbonate + iron + zinc + copper sources. Each precursor's source_substrate is tagged so narrators can validate against the scenario's substrate_inventory. NOTE: cement_calcite and concrete_calcite coexist as historical near-duplicate tokens in minerals.json — both map to source_substrate=concrete_demolition; rationalizing them is a future minerals.json schema cleanup task. NOT YET COVERED: secondary-redox-cycling precursors (biogenic H2S re-oxidation in burn halos, Fe²⁺/Fe³⁺ flipping, etc.), and atmospheric inputs (rainfall SO4 trace, CO2 dissolution). Slated for v0.2.0 with the burn-zone scenario.

drywall_sulfate.decay_mechanism: Slow dissolution of CaSO4·2H2O under leachate flow. Drywall is the dominant SO4 source in mature MSW cells once battery acid has been consumed.

battery_h2so4.decay_mechanism: Sulfuric-acid electrolyte release after polypropylene casing splits. Aggressive but short-lived — the battery's acid load is exhausted within the cell's first decade.

pvc_hcl.decay_mechanism: Thermal and chemical PVC degradation; HCl release becomes detectable around 40 yrs and continues over century-scale.

pvc_hcl_attack_on_zn.decay_mechanism: PVC-released HCl attacks adjacent galvanized substrate, mobilizing Zn²⁺ as ZnCl2; the chloride brine that drives goslarite/simonkolleite precipitation.

food_phosphate.decay_mechanism: Food-waste decomposition delivers PO4 from biological tissue, bone fragments, and detergent residue.

organic_co2.decay_mechanism: Methanogenesis end-products convert residual VFAs to bicarbonate; the late-phase pH neutralizer.

organic_reduction.decay_mechanism: Bulk anaerobic decomposition supplies the electron flux that runs sulfate-reducers, methanogens, and iron-reducers in the methanogenic core.

concrete_calcite.decay_mechanism: Slow dissolution of cement under acidogenic VFAs and later carbonic-acid ingress. The dominant Ca source in C&D-bearing cells.

rebar_iron.decay_mechanism: Anaerobic corrosion of steel reinforcement and white-goods scrap under reducing leachate.

drywall_sulfate_to_biogenic_h2s.decay_mechanism: Drywall SO4 reduced to S²⁻ by anaerobic sulfate-reducers in the methanogenic phase; the engine of the cell's sulfide chemistry.
drywall_sulfate_to_biogenic_h2s.narrator_phrase_short: biogenic H₂S from sulfate-reducer activity on drywall sulfate

battery_sulfate_to_biogenic_h2s.decay_mechanism: Battery-electrolyte SO4, after metals are sequestered by acidic-phase precipitation, becomes substrate for sulfate-reducers in the subsequent methanogenic phase.
battery_sulfate_to_biogenic_h2s.narrator_phrase_short: biogenic H₂S from sulfate-reducer activity on residual battery sulfate

copper_wiring_dissolution.decay_mechanism: Acidic leachate (organic VFAs + battery acid) attacks copper wiring buried in PCB scrap, motor stator coils, and electrical fittings. Cu²⁺ migrates with drainage chemistry rather than reacting in the methanogenic core's sulfide trap.
copper_wiring_dissolution.narrator_phrase_short: Cu²⁺ leached from buried copper wiring

galvanized_zinc_dissolution.decay_mechanism: Acidic leachate corrodes the zinc layer of galvanized fines, ductwork, and appliance shells. Major Zn source in any MSW cell.

battery_lead_dissolution.decay_mechanism: Lead-acid battery plates, after the polypropylene casing splits, expose metallic Pb to acidic SO4-bearing leachate. Pb²⁺ + SO4²⁻ → anglesite is the first-stage Pb fate; mobilized Pb that escapes that trap becomes the pyromorphite-bound deep-cell Pb.

cement_calcite.decay_mechanism: Cement matrix dissolution under acidogenic VFAs and later carbonic-acid ingress. Functionally equivalent to concrete_calcite — the two tokens coexist in minerals.json as historical near-duplicates and share their source substrate.

biogenic_carbonate.decay_mechanism: Methanogenesis end-products and microbial respiration deliver bicarbonate; the late-phase pH neutralizer that drives calcite stability.

protein_nh4.decay_mechanism: Protein and animal-product decomposition delivers ammonium. Pulse rates track the cell's hydraulic loading.

drywall_mg.decay_mechanism: Drywall and calcareous fines release Mg²⁺ alongside Ca²⁺ at slow rates. The Mg supply that lets struvite stabilize at the LCS biofilm.

manure_phosphate.decay_mechanism: Animal-waste fines deliver concentrated PO4 — a sub-set of organic_slurry chemistry but enriched. Source for vivianite at agricultural-derived MSW cells.

tire_pyrolysis_zns_char.decay_mechanism: Tire-pile fires pyrolyze the rubber matrix and concentrate ZnS in the post-burn char. Where this char migrates into the active methanogenic chemistry, sphalerite recrystallizes from the char's sulfide reservoir.
